name: Analysis
description: FutuRe profitability analysis hub with data cube, reference data, and charting views

content.description: Profitability analysis hub sourcing line of business data via IMeshQuery and loading estimates/actuals from static data arrays
content.configuration: config => config.WithContentType<AnalysisContent>().AddData(data => data.AddSource(source => source.WithType<AmountType>(t => t.WithInitialData(AmountType.All)).WithType<Currency>(t => t.WithInitialData(Currency.All)).WithType<Country>(t => t.WithInitialData(Country.All)).WithType<TransactionMapping>(t => t.WithInitialData(TransactionMapping.All))).WithVirtualDataSource("LineOfBusiness", vs => vs.WithVirtualType<LineOfBusiness>(workspace => FutuReDataLoader.LoadLinesOfBusinessFromNodes(workspace))).WithVirtualDataSource("FutuReDataCube", vs => vs.WithVirtualType<FutuReDataCube>(workspace => FutuReDataLoader.LoadDataCube(workspace)))).AddDefaultLayoutAreas().AddLayout(layout => layout.AddProfitabilityViews())
